label: Partial Attention Decoupling
description: Moderate attention decoupling under hybrid delegation

causal_translation.trigger_text: Your model has attention dependency above 50 under hybrid delegation.
causal_translation.rule_text: Partial delegation reduces but does not eliminate attention-dependent funnel.
causal_translation.shift_text: Conversion rate drops to 70% — moderate funnel compression.
causal_translation.effect_text: Margin reduced proportionally to partial attention loss.
